description: Canonical temporary pin for TanStack AI packages and the transitive @openrouter/sdk. Guarded by scripts/assert-tanstack-openrouter-pin.mjs. Update this file, the four pin sites (apps/itotori deps + root pnpm.overrides), and the lockfile together when re-pinning; never bump one package in isolation.
notes: The temporary fork is the root pnpm.overrides force of @openrouter/sdk to 0.13.55 while @tanstack/ai-openrouter@0.15.8 still declares exact 0.13.20. Offline install must materialise only the override version.
